name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A small thank-you from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed you cancelled recently, and that's completely okay — no pressure at all. We started Bright Smile to make dental care feel less scary, and the last thing we want is for any visit to feel like a sales pitch.

If the timing wasn't right, or something about the experience didn't sit well, I'd genuinely like to hear about it. Just hit reply — a real person on our team reads every note.

And if you'd like to come back when the moment feels right, here's 20% off your next cleaning or visit:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days — use it at checkout when you book. Free new-patient consultations are still on us, too.

Take care of yourself,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — quick heads up that your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in a few days. Use it whenever feels right, no pressure either way.

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
